top_signals.title: Iran War Fuels Renewables Interest, Multilateral Lender Says
top_signals.summary: The conflict in Iran, which has sent crude prices to multi-year highs, is fueling interest in renewables and projects aimed at boosting energy security, according to the Private Infrastructure Development Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran to get access to $6bn of frozen funds to buy US goods
top_signals.summary: Money held in Qatar to be released in phases under interim deal with Trump administration
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited Shareholders Overwhelmingly Re-Elect All Genco Director Nominees at 2026 Annual Meeting
top_signals.summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, the largest U.S. headquartered drybulk shipowner focused on the global transportation of commodities, yesterday announced that, based on preliminary results, Genco shareholders have overwhelmingly voted to re-elect all six of Genco’s director nominees — Paramita Das, Kathleen C. Haines, Basil G. Mavroleon, Karin Y. Orsel, Arthur L. Regan and John ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Gentlemen ransomware uses multiple EDR killers to disable defenses
top_signals.summary: The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) is actively developing and maintaining a suite of endpoint detection and response (EDR) killers to help affiliates evade detection in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA: Splunk Enterprise flaw actively exploited, patch by Sunday
top_signals.summary: CISA has urged U.S. federal agencies to secure their systems by Sunday against a critical Splunk Enterprise vulnerability that is being exploited in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
